texto: It just so happens that people aren't doing comedy about abortion or cannibalism or waterboarding. And that to me doesn't necessarily mean that there aren't aspects of those subjects that are funny, it just means that people are too uptight.
explicacao: Citação de Rob McElhenney sobre temas ligados a humor. “It just so happens that people aren't doing comedy about abortion or cannibalism or waterboarding…” articula humor, me, people em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como people e comedy.
